scripts.build:api: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/shared && npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/web
scripts.seed: npm run build -w apps/api && tsx scripts/seed-all.ts
scripts.create:admin: npm run build -w apps/api && tsx scripts/create-admin.ts
scripts.sync-indexes: npm run build -w apps/api && tsx scripts/sync-indexes.ts
